subtitle: Quick agenda, swap ideas, and nearby pivots for just the two of us.
notes: Use this app as the lightweight command center for the trip.
When the sheet is ready, replace the sample feeds with your published Google Sheets CSV tabs.
Each agenda item supports fast map and review links so you can pivot on the fly.

days.label: Thu
days.summary: Arrival, check-in, and first-night options downtown.

agenda.title: Hotel check-in
agenda.notes: Drop bags, recharge phones, and sanity-check tonight's plan.

agenda.title: Dinner reservation
agenda.notes: Primary dinner target. Keep one backup nearby in case timing slips.

agenda.title: Broadway walk
agenda.notes: Good flexible block if you want music, bars, or just people-watching.

swaps.title: Rooftop drinks instead of Broadway
swaps.notes: A quieter pivot if the strip feels too chaotic.
swaps.reviewQuery: best rooftop bars downtown nashville reviews

swaps.title: Casual hot chicken backup
swaps.notes: Useful if the dinner reservation runs late or you want something faster.

nearby.title: Coffee nearby
nearby.notes: Quick reset option before heading back out.

days.label: Fri
days.summary: Daytime exploring with room for flexible swaps.

agenda.title: Breakfast run
agenda.notes: Good morning anchor before neighborhood exploring.

agenda.title: Open flex block
agenda.notes: Use this slot for museums, rest, drinks, or a weather pivot.
agenda.reviewQuery: best afternoon things to do in Nashville reviews

swaps.title: Museum pivot
swaps.notes: Good rainy-day replacement for outdoor walking.

swaps.title: Spa or nap window
swaps.notes: Keeps the rest of the day fun if energy dips.

nearby.title: Cocktail bars nearby
nearby.notes: Good handoff from daytime wandering into evening.
